[general]
accounts = test
maxsyncaccounts = 1
ui = ttyui
pythonfile=~/.config/offlineimap/lib.py
socktimeout = 30
metadata = ~/.config/offlineimap/metadata

[Account test]
localrepository = test-local
remoterepository = test-remote
autorefresh = 2
postsynchook = ~/.config/offlineimap/test_hook.sh

[Repository test-local]
type = Maildir
localfolders = ~/test
foldersort=mycmp

[Repository test-remote]
type = IMAP
remotehost = imap.example.com
remoteuser = testuser
remotepasseval = get_keychain_item("test-password")
ssl = yes
sslcacertfile = /opt/homebrew/etc/gnutls/cert.pem
foldersort=mycmp
usecompression = no
maxconnections = 1
